texto: Arkady looked at the other man. he felt that he was actually seeing him as a physical being for the first time.....He tried to imagine that body with Bella, with any woman, and found the idea...not repulsive exactly, but incomprehensible. How would it work exactly? And how would either of them, knowing nothing of their lover's body, needs and desires, ever be able to satisfy the other?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Chris Moriarty que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “Arkady looked at the other man. he felt that he was actually seeing him as a physical being for t…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, gay, science-fiction, com foco em trabalho e science-fiction.
